'''Galalloy Industries''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] development and manufacturing corporation with a service history dating back to the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Galalloy was responsible for manufacturing the first true [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] to search [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] for valuable resources, such as metals to fuel the processing plants of industry. Probots later helped to expand the Republic's frontiers into the deep, unknown reaches of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="SWS" />
